──────────────

Repository
  Git:    /repo
  Config: /repo/.asagiri/config.yaml (chargée)

State
  SQLite: /repo/.asagiri/state.sqlite (présent, schema v1)
  Runs: 2  Tasks: 5  Active: onboarding

Gates (work)
  plan             disabled — gate désactivée
  enrich           active — mode per-task

Agents
  dev:       developer ✓ cursor

Trust
  Feature: onboarding  Verdict: Acceptable  (1 task à risque)
  1 task à risque

Checks
  ✓ git
  ✓ config

Prochaines actions
  → asa next --feature onboarding
     Continuer le workflow
Asagiri est prêt.
